ast.source: Warn about incorrect spelling of word(s).

ast.name: description
ast.source: Warn about invalid characters at the beginning of a sentence.
ast.target: 对句首无效字符发出警告。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Warn about the need to change the first letter of a sentence to lower case.
ast.target: 对需要将句首字母改为小写的情况发出警告。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description

ast.target: 警告否定词与动词不匹配并建议更正。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Warn about the need to use infinitive ending with 'a/ä' as the second verb.
ast.target: 警告需要将以“a/ä”结尾的不定式用作第二个动词。

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
